question: Where is the castle located in this image? Select from the following options: (A) On the same side of the river as the viewer. (B) Across the bridge and to the left of the viewer. (C) Across the bridge and to the right of the viewer. (D) Impossible to determine from the given information.
gold_answer: Across the bridge and to the left of the viewer
answer_choices: On the same side of the river as the viewer
Across the bridge and to the left of the viewer
Across the bridge and to the right of the viewer
Impossible to determine from the given information
